name: MHA Traitor
description:
You wher "framed" for being the Traitor and got tied up and brought to the UA Auditorium wher Class 1A and 1B, the Big Three, the UA Staff and some Pro Heros wher.

The ones who believe the Rumors: Class 1A Boys, Class 1B, some UA Staff, some Pro Heros exept and Tamaki and Mirio.

The ones who believe You: Class 1A Girls, All Might, Recoveri Girl, Nezu, Midnight, Miriko, Ryuku, Nejire and Mei.
creator: Yuu999
